acceptance_criteria.text: web_api module AxxonMcpWebApi with 6 tools; env-only lazy connect; secret redaction; injectable client/socket factories for offline tests.
client_api module AxxonMcpClientApi with 3 tools; preflight is read-only socket/HTTP probe returning sanitized dicts; list_client_api_operations marks every op fixture-needed and does no wire.
web_events_probe is a single handshake; web_events_sample hard-caps frames and seconds, returns opcode/size tallies only (no raw payload), and both restrict to allowlisted WS paths.
proof: raw/live-evidence.json: web_events_sample frames=1 opcode_tallies={close:1} payload_bytes_seen=2 frame_cap=4 seconds_cap=5.0; web_events_probe_events/ws http_status=101 upgraded=true

acceptance_criteria.text: embeddable_component_url builds a valid /embedded.html iframe src with no credentials + paste-ready snippet; embeddable_component_commands returns the typed postMessage catalog matching the integration doc.
Both groups wired into axxon_mcp_server.py: CAPABILITY_GROUPS, --enable-web-api/--enable-client-api, register_*_tools, create_server params, enabled_groups, main() lazy construction.
proof: tools/axxon_mcp_server.py (CAPABILITY_GROUPS web_api/client_api; register_web_api_tools; register_client_api_tools; create_server kwargs; main() construction)
raw/build.txt: --help lists both flags; group count 53; 321 server.tool decorators

acceptance_criteria.text: Offline unit tests cover connect/redaction, URL/command builders, WS probe/sample caps + no-raw-bytes + path allowlist, preflight read-only/sanitized, fixture-needed catalog, and server registration.
proof: tools/tests/test_axxon_mcp_web_api.py (11 tests), tools/tests/test_axxon_mcp_client_api.py (6 tests), 3 server tests

acceptance_criteria.text: Full suite python3.12 -m unittest discover -s tools/tests exits 0, +20 over prior 1156, no regressions.

Docs updated with re-derived counts: README tool-layers + counts; roadmap Current Numbers + HTTP/WebSocket/embeddable row + Layouts/client-UI row + backlog item 3. COVERAGE.md unchanged (RPC-focused, no new RPCs).
proof: README.md (326 tools / 53 groups / nine layers; Client / Web API layer row)
docs/ALL_IN_ONE_VMS_API_ROADMAP.md (Current Numbers 326/53; HTTP/WebSocket/embeddable row; Layouts...client UI row; backlog item 3)

commands_for_fresh_verifier: PYTHONPATH=tools python3.12 -c "import axxon_mcp_server as s; print('web_api' in s.CAPABILITY_GROUPS, 'client_api' in s.CAPABILITY_GROUPS, len(s.CAPABILITY_GROUPS))"
known_gaps: client_api operations are fixture-needed by design: the stand's Client HTTP API port 8888 is closed; promotion to apply-ready needs a reachable client target.
web_events_sample reports WS transport-level frame metadata only; application-level event payload decoding needs the undocumented subscribe protocol.
